cmd:
bash -c 
  /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/foldseek/build/src/foldseek search exDB exDB aln_cpu2 tmp_cpu2 --gpu 0 -e 10 2>&1 | grep -E 'Time for processing' | tail -1 &&
  /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/foldseek/build/src/foldseek search exDB exDB_pad aln_gpu2 tmp_gpu2 --gpu 1 -e 10 2>&1 | grep -E 'ungapped|Time for processing' | head -5 &&
  echo GPU_DONE

bash -c 
export PATH="/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/foldseek/build/src:$PATH"
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/foldseek/build/lib/mmseqs/lib/libmarv/src:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:-}"
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/foldseek_test_gfx1100

echo "=== createdb ==="
foldseek createdb /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/foldseek/src/example/ exDB 2>&1
echo "createdb exit: $?"

echo "=== CPU search (oracle) ==="
foldseek search exDB exDB aln_cpu tmp_cpu --gpu 0 -e 10 2>&1
echo "cpu search exit: $?"

echo "=== makepaddedseqdb ==="
foldseek makepaddedseqdb exDB exDB_pad 2>&1
echo "makepaddedseqdb exit: $?"

echo "=== GPU search (gfx1100, GPU[3]) ==="
CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=3 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=3 foldseek search exDB exDB_pad aln_gpu tmp_gpu --gpu 1 -e 10 2>&1
echo "gpu search exit: $?"

echo "=== convertalis CPU ==="
foldseek convertalis exDB exDB aln_cpu cpu.m8 2>&1
echo "convertalis cpu exit: $?"

echo "=== convertalis GPU ==="
foldseek convertalis exDB exDB_pad aln_gpu gpu.m8 2>&1
echo "convertalis gpu exit: $?"

echo "=== DONE ==="
